/usr/sbin/c++ -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow -Wconversion -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/Mesh/Sphere3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/Mesh/Surface3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/Renderer/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/Renderer/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/Renderer/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/Physics/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/util/eventHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluX.dir/src/glad.c.o -o FluX  /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 -ldl
